cmd.sendToFlowboard.title: Send to Flowboard
cmd.openFlowboard.title: Solidity Flowboard: Open Flowboard
cfg.language.description: UI and AI language. Default is English; choose "ru" for Russian. Reload the window after changing.
cfg.claudePath.description: Path to the Claude Code CLI (used for AI annotations and analysis). Defaults to "claude" on PATH.
cfg.model.description: Model for AI features: an alias ("opus", "sonnet") or a full name. Empty = the Claude Code default model.
cfg.codebaseContext.description: Analyze the function in the context of the whole codebase: Claude runs at the project root with read-only file access (Read/Grep/Glob) and pulls in related code. More accurate, but slower and uses more of your subscription quota. Turn off for a fast analysis of just the function text.
